hero.title:
Contact Mission Control:
 We are at your service
hero.subtitle: We are morning people. How can we help?
hero.description: Whether you require bespoke logistical arrangements or specific flight information, our dedicated concierge team is ready to assist. You will speak directly with our aviation experts never a machine who possess an intimate knowledge of the Teotihuacán Valley and our operations.

info.title: Instant Answers
info.subtitle: CUSTOMER SUPPORT
info.paragraph: For the fastest response, use our direct WhatsApp Concierge. We manage bookings, weather updates, and last-minute requests in real-time.
info.guarantee: We typically respond in under 5 minutes
info.corporateDescription: We operate with full fiscal and aeronautical transparency. Whether you require comprehensive tax invoicing (Factura Fiscal), detailed insurance liability policies for your legal department, or complex logistics for large-scale groups (20 to 100+ passengers), our team is prepared to execute. Please use the dedicated channel below to be connected directly with our Commercial & Operations Department for a bespoke consultation.
info.availabilityText: Availability, special dietary requests, proposal coordination, and weather checks.

locationFaq.title: Find the Globoport.
locationFaq.content:
Carretera a las Pirámides, Teotihuacán, Edo. Mex.
We are located 5 minutes from the archaeological zone.
locationFaq.ask1-answer:
Our prices vary depending on season and availability.
We recommend booking in advance.
Contact us for group rates.
locationFaq.ask2-answer:
Flights are weather dependent for safety.
We monitor conditions daily.
You will be notified if rescheduling is required.
locationFaq.ask3-answer:
Wear comfortable clothing.
Closed shoes are required.
Bring a light jacket in early mornings.
